exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your fashion design forward
items: Create a concept statement and sketch 5 initial design ideas that reflect your unique design aesthetic and target market
Research and analyze 5 successful fashion brands that target your intended market segment
Define your target customer by creating a detailed persona including demographics, lifestyle, and budget
Source and order fabric swatches from 3-5 different suppliers to build your material library
Learn basic fashion design software by completing a simple garment sketch using digital tools
Create detailed technical specification sheets for 3 basic garment types in your collection
